title: SQL: implied conversion from numeric to varchar disconnect
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value DECIMAL(10, 3), description VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, description) VALUES (1, 11.456, 'Test value');
SELECT CONCAT(value, description) FROM test_table WHERE id = 1;
SELECT value + 1.5 AS new_value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NULL OR value < 10;
key_bug_features: implied conversion from numeric to varchar
